sglang.title: [feat] Enable chunked prefill for llava-onevision
sglang.author: Ying1123
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Need to update for qwen2-vl and mllama.

sglang.title: Typo fix in router.md
sglang.author: adarshxs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Typo fix "routher" -> "router" in route.md

Checklist

 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [V1] Fix Detokenizer loading in `AsyncLLM`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Follow up of #10288 to add missing configs for loading Detokenizer in AsyncLLM for online serving.

vllm.title: [Core] Require xgrammar >= 0.1.6
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This fixes the issue raised in PR #10935.
From the xgrammar team:

We just released xgrammar 0.1.6, supporting integer range and
pattern in JSON Schema

Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Platform] Move `async output` check to platform
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #9268
This is the last PR for platform reactor for config module.
This PR move the async output ability check to platform to avoid device hard code in config module.

vllm.title: [V1] Input Batch Relocation
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Move InputBatch and CachedRequestState object definitions from gpu_model_runner.py to gpu_input_batch.py. No changes in functionality.

vllm.title: [ci/build] Recompile CI dependencies list with Python 3.12
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It was compiled with Python 3.9 previously.. this PR is to re-compile it in 3.12

vllm.title: [V1] Further reduce CPU overheads in flash-attn
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR reduces the CPU ops in V1 flash-attn: two slice ops for key and value by slightly modifying the reshape_and_cache_flash op.
Also, it uses kv_cache.unbind(0) instead of kv_cache[0] and kv_cache[1], to reduce the number of ops.

vllm.title: [Misc][LoRA] Abstract PunicaWrapper
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After completing #10917 and #10829, we are now abstracting  PunicaWrapper to facilitate  different platforms support LoRA . Each platform will implement its own PunicaWrapper variant independently, without interfering with each other.
cc @sanjucsudhakaran

vllm.title: [Model] Implement merged input processor for Phi-3-Vision models
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implement merged input processor for Phi-3-Vision models

TODO

 Expose num_crops and update mm_processor_kwargs test

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Hardware][Gaudi] Bump vllm_hpu_extension version
vllm.author: kzawora-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vllm_hpu_extension had vllm.utils.get_vllm_instance_id dependency, which was removed in #10976, causing HPU backend to crash on vllm_hpu_extension import. Extension was updated to remove that dependency (HabanaAI/vllm-hpu-extension#52), and this PR contains that fix.
Small changes were needed to hpu

vllm.title: [v1] fix use compile sizes
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
followup of #10933
v1 needs to use warmup before capturing cudagraph, for autotuning.
the latency benchmark is similar to #10933 :
$ VLLM_USE_V1=1 VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=1 python benchmark_latency.py --model meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B --batch-size 1
Avg latency: 0.9447320922433088 seconds
10

vllm.title: [Neuron] Upgrade neuron to 2.20.2
vllm.author: xendo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This change also fixed loading Neuron models. Neuron uses old pytorch,
before the change I was getting
TypeError: infer_schema() takes 1 positional argument but 2 were given

which was caused by custom_op direct registration. I'm disabling that if custom_op is not available.
I tested this using
vllm

vllm.title: [ROCm][bugfix] Setting the value for the scpecilative decoding worker class on rocm platform
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt: sd_worker_cls was left to its default value of 'auto', which led to a subsequent crash in trying to .rsplit('.') and extract 2 values out of it

vllm.title: Build tpu image in release pipeline
vllm.author: richardsliu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add a release pipeline task for building and pushing vLLM TPU image
FIX #10878

vllm.title: [V1] Do not store `None` in self.generators
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a bug in V1 model runner that stores None generator for requests without seeds. This made random_sample method of the sampler process each request sequentially, causing unnecessary perf decrease.

vllm.title: [Docs] Add dedicated tool calling page to docs
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Also adds a quickstart example for automatic function calling

vllm.title: [Model] Add has_weight to RMSNorm and re-enable weights loading tracker for Mamba
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is a following PR for #10456

This PR introduces elementwise_affine to RMSNorm, just like pytorch implementation, which could be used to handle unlearnable RMSNorm layer without Parameter initialization.
This PR also enables the weight loading tracker for Mamba, which is disabled in #10456.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix usage of `deprecated` decorator
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR moves the preferred overload to the top so that it takes priority over deprecated overloads. This fixes an issue where LLM.generate(text) and LLM.encode(text) are incorrectly marked as deprecated.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Use request id from header
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is a small proposal to populate the request ids in the engine from the X-Request-Id header when running the openai server. This will benefit traceability: when users pass in the header they can correlate vLLM logs with the request that generated them, something that our users are asking for. If

vllm.title: [Pixtral] Improve loading
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Pixtral loading was very memory-inefficient before because itertool's tee operator required 3x more memory than necessary. This PR fixes it

vllm.title: [V1] Multiprocessing Tensor Parallel Support for v1
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Implementation of tensor parallel support for V1.
Some differences from V0:

The executor creates N worker processes rather than N-1 processes like in V0
All processes run prepare_inputs.
All processes run the sampler. This means that all workers need the logits so the logits_processor has an AllGat

vllm.title: monitor metrics of tokens per step using cudagraph batchsizes
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: will be used for torch.compile

vllm.author: sjuxax
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In trying to use an updated Pixtral-HF with xgrammar, I got AttributeError: 'LlavaConfig' object has no attribute 'vocab_size'. Full traceback:

vllm.title: Update README.md
vllm.author: dmoliveira
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add news about vLLM joins pytorch ecosystem.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] cuda error running llama 3.2
vllm.author: GeneDer
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Re: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/9850/files#diff-107fd4a59dcd0831ff802fefe9c49eac02432b6a6d1f508075a8b1809c1468b4R11-R15
